Petition For Instructions; And Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Professional Fiduciary As Successor Trustee (Probate Code Â§Â§17200(B)(6) And 17200(B)(10))
Off Calendar Apr-08-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arthur Meirson for Kane Ng and Skyler Ng. Robert Shepard for Su Huang. Amanda Ebey for Joseph Ng.

The Court stated that this is a mirror petition to the petition that was sent off to the trial department. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the new petition not being cumulative to the prior petition, undue influence and how the third amendment was brought about, removal of Mr. Ng and appointed of a Neutral Fiduciary pending resolution of the merits of the case, other remedies that may be available to the Beneficiaries (accounting/surcharge), reasons for the Court to exercise it's own powers, conflict of interest, whether or not the trust litigation is for the sole benefit of the Trustee or the Trust, whether or not the second amendment should be confirmed, etc. The Court will issue an order consolidating this matter with the earlier petition which has a trial date set of August 11, 2014.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendments, Ascertain Trust Beneficiaries, Remove Trustee, Etc.
Off Calendar Jan-14-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Eric Sofge for Petitioner. Amanda Ebey for Joseph Engh (Respondent). Robert Shepard for Su Huang.

Counsel requested to set trial date and that they will need 3 to 5 days for trial. The matter was referred to the Department of the Presiding Judge (206) for trial setting (order for the same signed in open Court).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. Not Reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendments, Ascertain Trust Beneficiaries, Remove Trustee, Etc.
Off Calendar Nov-26-2013 Continued To Jan-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Kane Ng (Petitioner). Amanda Ebey for Joseph Engh. Robert Shepard for Su Huang (Guardian Ad Litem for Eric Ng).

Mr. Shepard stated that he is substituting in for Mr. Pedder and that the Substitution of Attorney is being signed. Mr. Melbostad stated that they agreed on a mediation date, that they will start on December 30, 2013 and that they have also reserved December 31, 2013 with Douglas Voorsanger (Mediator). The Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust Amendments, etc. was continued to January 14, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner and request more time if mediation is not completed by that date so that no appearance is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendments, Ascertain Trust Beneficiaries, Remove Trustee, Etc.
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Continued To Nov-26-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendments, Ascertain Trust Beneficiaries, Remove Trustee, Etc.
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Continued To Nov-12-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Kang Ng. Amanda Ebey for and with Joseph Ng. Stanley Pedder appearing by Court Call for Guardian Ad Litem Su Huang.

Mr. Melbostad stated that he had spoken with Ms. Ebey, that he informed Ms. Ebey that his client worked for a production company and was currently working in Italy, that his client would be returning in September or October, that the depositions could be taken at that time, and that everything had been on hold because his client had been out of the country. Ms. Ebey stated that they were waiting to get some discovery. All parties stated that they were onboard with mediation. The Court signed an order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than November 5, 2013. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by November 7, 2013. The matter was continued to November 12, 2013 and the Parties are to return on November 12, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee. (Not Reported)
